overall: The reconstruction contains missing content and a formatting issue in the rendering.

problems.description: The reconstruction is missing the full context of the jewellery guideline: 'Jewellery must not dangle; no hoop earrings or large necklaces.' The phrase is incomplete and doesn't convey the full original guideline.

The item's section was labeled as 'General Everyday Style', but the bullet point rendering is inconsistent as it ends abruptly and does not properly conclude the thought, implying incomplete information.

overall: The reconstruction omits key details and has structural issues affecting clarity.

problems.description: The reconstruction is missing the end of the section with 'Underwear worn in' which is incomplete in the original, and this information is not carried over.
The bullet points should be combined into a continuous list without the 'Not acceptable:' repeated for each item, as the original format implies a singular list.

The phrase 'Indoor wearing of baseball caps or hats; high-heeled stiletto shoes or beach flip-flops (indoors).' was split into separate bullet points in the reconstruction, when it should remain as a single item.
The reconstruction has merged two distinct clothing categories, such as 'Leisure shorts, tracksuits, or sportswear' into one bullet, while these can be seen as separate categories in the original.
